fix_1_append_audit_event.fix: Docstring now enumerates all required fields (event_id, session_id, stage_id, tool_name, outcome, message)
fix_1_append_audit_event.evidence: Called successfully 5 times across stages 0-4 with all required fields. No validation errors.

fix_2_evaluate_nli.fix: Now gracefully degrades when sampling is unavailable (returns INCONCLUSIVE instead of raising)
fix_2_evaluate_nli.evidence: Called in Stage 4. Returned error: 'Client does not support sampling'. The tool still raises an error instead of returning INCONCLUSIVE. The graceful degradation fix is NOT working in the current MCP context.

fix_3_verify_graph.fix: Docstring now has full schema (NodeType enum values, RelationshipType enum values, required fields)
fix_3_verify_graph.evidence: Called successfully 3 times (stages 1, 3, 4). Correctly validated graphs with requirement/implementation/test/specification node types and depends/tests/requires/implies relationships. UUID format requirement discovered and handled.

fix_4_fuse_confidence.fix: Docstring now has full ConfidenceEstimate schema (source enum values, value, uncertainty, reasoning)
fix_4_fuse_confidence.evidence: First call with incorrect source values ('hor_rules') correctly returned validation error showing valid enum values. Second call with correct source enum values (thought_buffer, adaptive_expansion, metacognitive, trm_refinement) succeeded. Fused confidence: 0.868.

summary.blocking_issue: evaluate_nli still raises error when sampling unavailable instead of graceful degradation
